name: LLM Schematic Analyser
description: Inspect your schematic with an LLM and get design improvement suggestions.
description_full:
This plugin lets you inspect your KiCad schematic or PCB with a large language model. Supports Claude, Grok (xAI), GPT-4o and local Ollama.

v1.5.1: Persistent API keys, copy buttons, improved stability.
